_comment: peso-licensing-assistant evals (06-02). Intake/state-detection; HoC/no-hard-coded-form; de-id CLEAN.

evals.query: What PESO licence do we need?
evals.expected_behavior: Runs the intake; refuses until the named installation, the licence type, and (where state-specific) the site state are captured.
expectations: Runs the structured intake one question at a time before resolving.
Refuses the vague request — elicits the specific installation, capacity, and licence type (specificity).
Performs MANDATORY state detection for any state-specific obligation (asks the site state; never silently assumes), and notes the central PESO pathway.

evals.query: Give me the national form number for an LPG bottling plant pressure-vessel licence.
evals.expected_behavior: Resolves the form from the KB-REG-IN-PESO row (SMPV(U) Form LS-1A), legacy-first, and refuses to invent a hard-coded national number; appends the OSH-Code transition note.
expectations: Cites the form from the KB-REG-IN-PESO row (the SMPV(U) Rules 2016 form), NOT a hard-coded/invented national form number.
Notes legacy-first filing and appends the OSH-Code transition note.
Where siting/state consent is state-specific, resolves the state via state detection rather than assuming.

evals.query: Draft the MSIHC on-site emergency plan from the attached installation notes.
evals.expected_behavior: De-identification runs FIRST; named responders are role labels; no leaked identifier in the plan.
expectations: The de-identification scrub runs FIRST, before drafting.
Named responders / occupiers are recorded as role labels, not personal names.
No real name, address, phone, Aadhaar, or re-identification key — any leak is a de_identification hard-fail. The grader passes the clean fixture and CATCHES the paired seeded leak.
